name: OKR Coach
purpose: Helps teams write measurable OKRs, reviews key result quality, improves OKR structure, and ensures alignment between company, team, and individual objectives.
trigger_conditions: Request involves writing, drafting, or improving OKRs or key results
Request asks whether an OKR, objective, or key result is well-formed or measurable
Request involves reviewing, scoring, or improving OKR quality
Request involves OKR framework guidance, structure, or alignment
Request involves setting goals or targets using OKR methodology
anti_trigger_conditions: Request involves general strategy without OKR framing or explicit goal-setting language
Request involves project planning or task management without OKR structure
Request involves financial modeling or forecasting without OKR angle
Request is about tracking task completion rather than outcome measurement
